name: Creamy Iced Coffee
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chilled brewed coffee, made double-strength
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coffee, sugar, and ice in a large pitcher or container.
2. Stir until well mixed and creamy.
3. Serve over ice in individual glasses.
Nutritional information per serving: 122 calories; 0.011 grams total fat (0% of calories from fat); 0 milligrams cholesterol; 6.20 milligrams sodium.
